title: Born This Way
why_this_song: Born This Way by Lady Gaga (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 35 times; first heard in: "'Cause you were born this way, baby"
Appears 24 times; first heard in: "'Cause you were born this way, baby"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "I'm on the right track, baby, I was born this way"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "I'm on the right track, baby, I was born this way"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Don't hide yourself in regret, just love yourself, and you're set"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "born" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "born" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't be a drag, just be a queen

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause you were born this way, baby
Mi amore vole fe, yah (same DNA)
'Cause, baby, you were born this way

exercises.prompt_en: "Born This Way" was released in 2011. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Born This Way" foi lançada em 2011. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Born This Way" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Born This Way" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
